item.title: Significant policy change needed for local-party rule, Dewan told
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Law and institutional reform minister Azalina Othman Said says such a policy for Sabah and Sarawak will have implications, including in terms of freedom of association.
Matched: policy(+3), law(+3), parliament(+2), war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Group slams ‘irresponsible’ MPs who abstained from voting
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Projek Sama says the lawmakers have denied the country the benefits of limiting the prime minister’s term.
Matched: law(+3), parliament(+2), corruption(+3), war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Wall Street ends lower as Middle East conflict fans inflation fears
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Investors are growing anxious about the war’s duration and its impact on energy markets as oil extends sharp gains.

item.title: X suspends revenue sharing for undisclosed AI war videos
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today

item.title: Iran steps up attacks on Mideast economy in response to US-Israeli strikes
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
US President Donald Trump warned it was 'too late' for the Islamic republic to seek talks to escape the war.

item.title: Lawyers dismiss claims Naimah Khalid out to topple government
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today

Matched: law(+3), corruption(+3), war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: US-Israeli strikes pummel Tehran, as Trump says ‘too late’ for talks
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Israel announced a 'large-scale wave' of strikes targeting Iran's capital Tuesday, with local media showing columns of smoke rising over the centre of town.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: PKR man blames BN for term limit bill failure
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Batu PKR chief Asheeq Ali Sethi Alivi dismisses claims that the failure to pass the constitutional amendment bill reflects weak support for the prime minister.

item.title: Drop in diesel subsidy expenditure results in RM4bil savings
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The finance ministry says the savings were achieved through the retargeting of diesel subsidies in Peninsular Malaysia via the subsidised diesel control system.

item.title: Iranian opposition figure Pahlavi calls for unity from ethnic minorities
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The son of Iran’s last shah Reza Pahlavi has called on ethnic minorities not to use the current conflict to press for separation.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Projek Sama kecam MP ‘tak bertanggungjawab’ pilih kecuali undi
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Kumpulan masyarakat sivil berkata, Ahli-ahli Parlimen tersebut nafi negara daripada manfaat had tempoh jawatan PM.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: RUU gagal bukan kerana PM tak cukup sokongan, kata pemimpin PKR
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Ketua PKR Batu Asheeq Ali Sethi Alivi berkata, RUU had penggal PM tak lulus disebabkan kurangnya komitmen segelintir Ahli Parlimen BN.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)
